  "experiment_overview": "The experiment involves the fabrication and characterization of a novel material system, specifically focusing on the deposition and properties of cadmium sulfide (CdS) nanowires (AgNWs) coated with a second layer of CdS. The goal is to enhance the electrical performance of the material by optimizing the thickness and composition of the layers.",

    "The experiment progresses to the deposition of the first layer of AgNWs onto a substrate, followed by the deposition of a second layer of CdS.",
    "The final step involves characterizing the deposited layers using techniques such as scanning electron microscopy (SEM) and current-voltage (I-V) measurements."
  ],

    "Tissues: None."
